description: Style NoteFall head over heels in love with this chic and stylish satchel from baggit. Its timeless design is set to see you through many seasons to come. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can pair this bag with western as well as ethnic ensembles.Product DetailsPink corduroy (sequinned) and faux-leather satchel with one main zippered compartment Flap with inverted box pleat and magnetic button closureBranding at backPocket in front with Velcro closure and zippered pocketInner separator and synthetic lining with zippered pocketsOne zippered pocket at backOne long adjustable shoulder strapMaterial and CareSynthetic, fabricWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirtSizeHeight: 23 cmWidth: 26 cmDepth: 7 cm
